headings.usage: Use for all page titles, card headers, and major typographic elements.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, table data, and UI text.

buttons.primary: bg-red-700 hover:bg-red-800 text-white font-medium py-2 px-4 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium py-2 px-4 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 font-medium py-2 px-4 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.stats: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-6 flex flex-col justify-between

badges.success: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 text-xs font-semibold px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded
badges.warning: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 text-xs font-semibold px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded
badges.blue: bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 text-xs font-semibold px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded

general: Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Import via Google Fonts.
Implement a responsive sidebar layout. On mobile, it should be a drawer.
Use the specified color palette strictly. Avoid using arbitrary hex values outside the system.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover/active states.
dashboard: Implement a 'Bento Grid' layout for the stats overview.
The 'Outstanding Payment' card should be prominent (use light red background with red text).
The 'GPA' card should use the primary blue background with white text for contrast.
courses: Replicate the 'Slanted Badge' design for course levels (e.g., '300lvl'). Use a CSS clip-path or a rotated div.
Course cards must show: Image, Level Badge, Course Title, Code, Units, and Status (Core/Elective, Completed/Enrolled).
login: Split screen layout: Left side form, Right side image (use 'login_bg').
Form should be clean, centered, with a 'Forgot Password?' link.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where appropriate (e.g., toast, sticky headers).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp with slight radius).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖, 🧠, etc.) for icons. Use Lucid React icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
